fields.value:
What am I still thinking about that I pretend doesn’t affect me anymore? ||
Did it really end, or did it just stop? ||
What version of love do I keep going back to, even when I know better? ||
Where in my life does something feel unfinished? ||
What would I say if I could have one honest conversation with them? ||
What am I holding onto that I haven’t fully processed yet? ||
If timing had been different, would the outcome really have changed? ||
What does closure actually look like for me — and do I need it? ||
What kind of stories do I gravitate toward lately, and what does that say about me? ||
What am I romanticizing that didn’t actually feel good in real time? ||
If my life right now were a book, what would this chapter be called? ||
What am I afraid to admit I still want? ||
What parts of my past still feel a little too present? ||
What does “moving on” actually mean to me? ||
What am I learning about myself in this in-between season? ||
What kind of love am I hoping for next — and what will I do differently? ||
What habits or routines are quietly shaping my life right now? ||
Where am I choosing comfort over honesty? ||
What kind of main character energy am I stepping into this month? ||
What book felt a little too real for me recently — and why? ||
What emotions have I been avoiding sitting with? ||
What would it look like to trust the timing of my life? ||
Where do I need to give myself more patience? ||
What does “starting fresh” actually mean for me right now? ||
What kind of relationships feel safe to me — and which ones don’t? ||
What am I outgrowing, even if it’s hard to admit? ||
If I could rewrite one moment in my life, would I — and why? ||
What do I want more of in my everyday life, not just in big moments? ||
What does my ideal slow, quiet day look like? ||
What am I ready to leave behind as this month begins? ||

fields.value:
What version of me am I becoming - and is it someone I actually like? ||
Where in my life am I settling out of fear instead of choosing out of desire? ||
What does “success” mean to me if no one is watching? ||
What am I holding onto that I’ve already outgrown? ||
If I trusted myself completely, what decision would I make right now? ||
What patterns keep repeating in my relationships, and what are they trying to teach me? ||
What does my ideal ordinary day look like - not the highlight reel, just a Tuesday? ||
Where am I performing instead of being authentic? ||
What would change if I stopped trying to be impressive and focused on being fulfilled? ||
What boundaries do I need to set to protect the woman I’m becoming? ||
Who do I become when I’m alone - and do I feel at peace with her? ||
What kind of love am I truly available for right now? ||
What am I avoiding because it requires discomfort to grow? ||
If my 16-year-old self saw my life today, what would she be proud of? ||
What financial, emotional, or physical habits would future me thank me for building now? ||
What does rest look like for me when it isn’t earned? ||
Where in my life do I need more softness? ||
If this season of my life were a book, what would this chapter be called? ||
What kind of main character energy am I embodying - and is it aligned with my values? ||
What fears are disguised as “logic” in my decision-making? ||
Who inspires me deeply - and what qualities do they reflect back to me about myself? ||
If I stopped chasing validation, what would I start building instead? ||
What parts of myself only come out around certain people - and why? ||
If my life were a romance novel, what trope am I living right now? ||
What would it look like to choose myself unapologetically this year? ||
What do I crave more of - intimacy, adventure, stability, recognition - and why? ||
What story about myself am I ready to rewrite? ||
What does emotional safety mean to me? ||
If I could design my dream life five years from now, what would it feel like on a random Sunday morning? ||
What am I romanticizing that may not actually be good for me? ||
If I treated my life like a sacred manuscript, what would I edit out - and what would I expand?

fields.value: he said he'd ruin me and i said please.
fields.jsonValue: he said he'd ruin me and i said please.

fields.value:
What beauty am I only now learning to see in things that are broken? ||
What would I do differently if I stopped being afraid of being too much? ||
What does devotion look like when it isn't being performed for anyone? ||
Where in my life am I wearing a mask I've forgotten isn't my face? ||
What would I fight for, even if I lost? ||
What feeling have I been dressing up as something more acceptable? ||
If my heart were a locked room, what would someone find inside it? ||
What am I grieving that I never got to call a loss? ||
Where do I feel most like myself — and how often do I go there? ||
What story am I telling myself that might not be true anymore? ||
What does it mean to love something that was never fully mine? ||
If I could be ruthlessly honest about one thing today, what would it be? ||
What part of me is still waiting for permission to exist? ||
What have I survived that I haven't given myself credit for? ||
Where does tenderness still live in me, even after everything? ||
What am I drawn to in fiction that I'm afraid to want in real life? ||
What would change if I stopped shrinking to make others comfortable? ||
What feeling do I keep mistaking for weakness that might actually be depth? ||
Where am I still punishing myself for something that deserves forgiveness? ||
What does it feel like to want something with no guarantee of getting it? ||
What version of me existed before I learned to be careful? ||
If love were a place, what would mine look like right now? ||
What am I protecting myself from that I might actually be ready for? ||
What do I need to say out loud before I can finally let it go? ||
Where in my body do I carry the things I haven't said yet? ||
What would it feel like to be chosen, slowly and on purpose? ||
What chapter of my life do I keep rereading instead of turning the page? ||
What do I secretly hope someone notices about me? ||
If this season of my life had a scent, a sound, a color — what would they be? ||
What am I becoming, even on the days it doesn't feel like it? ||
What did may ask of me — and did I answer? ||
